title: Product Management & Growth Strategy
target: Lead Product Manager / Head of Product

tracks.title: Product Discovery & User Needs Validation
tracks.description: Formulate product hypothesis, interview users, and validate product-market fit.

milestones.title: Market Hypothesis & Opportunity Solution Trees
milestones.description: Identify high-value user problems and define value propositions.

resources.title: Continuous Discovery Habits Book & Video
resources.notes: Learn opportunity solution trees, customer interview techniques, and rapid testing.

tracks.title: Agile Execution & Feature Prioritization
tracks.description: Write PRDs, manage sprint backlogs, and prioritize features using RICE & Kano models.

milestones.title: Roadmapping & Backlog Refinement
milestones.description: Translate strategy into actionable user stories and sprint cycles.

resources.title: Product Management PRD Template & Masterclass
resources.notes: Draft comprehensive PRDs, define acceptance criteria, and calculate RICE scores.

tracks.title: Product Analytics & Growth Metrics
tracks.description: Define North Star metrics, analyze user cohorts, and optimize conversion funnels.

milestones.title: Funnel Optimization & Growth Loops
milestones.description: Drive user activation, retention, and referral metrics.

resources.title: Product Analytics & Growth Funnel Walkthrough
resources.notes: Analyze Mixpanel/Amplitude cohort graphs, retention curves, and A/B test significance.
